ResearchProjectDef.label: abyssal signal theory
ResearchProjectDef.description: Controlled interaction with extra-dimensional hostile signatures through machine-assisted ritual geometry. Establishes the first Abyssal Protocol research foothold and unlocks the infrastructure needed for breach work.

ResearchProjectDef.label: abyssal armaments
ResearchProjectDef.description: Weaponized containment of breach-energy. Unlocks the first practical infernal weapons and serves as the conventional foundation for later Herald-grade weapon research.

ResearchProjectDef.label: abyssal augmentation
ResearchProjectDef.description: Military infernal augmentation theory, laying the groundwork for advanced boss-derived implants and later Herald-grade reverse engineering.
